snps.effect_template: TCF7L2 — strongest common genetic risk factor for T2D. T allele increases risk ~1.4x per copy.
KCNJ11 E23K variant. Modest effect on insulin secretion and T2D risk.
SLC30A8 variant affecting zinc transporter in pancreatic beta cells.

recommendation_template: Focus on modifiable risk factors: maintain healthy weight, regular exercise, balanced diet. Monitor fasting glucose and HbA1c periodically.

studies.title: Replication of genome-wide association signals in UK samples reveals risk loci for type 2 diabetes
studies.finding: TCF7L2 rs7903146 T allele strongest common T2D risk variant (OR=1.37)
